The '''Aramandi''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] mammalian bipeds indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aram]].

==Biology and appearance==
[[File:ArakOmis-FlashpointBrakSector.png|thumb|left|150px|A [[Taal]] of the Aramandi, [[Arak Omis]].]]

They had four [[Limb/Legends|arms]] and four [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Because of living for generations in Aram's heavy [[Gravity/Legends|gravity]], their bodies were short and stout. Their skin [[Color/Legends|coloration]] ranged from light red to light brown, and their eyes were a solid black color.<ref name="AE" />

==Society and culture==
As a people, the Aramandi were governed by the religious beliefs of the [[Eeronon]], and divided themselves into four distinct clans or [[akia]]: the [[Orma (akia)|Orma]], [[Cirra]], [[Mila (akia)|Mila]], and [[Lota]]. All four clans were ruled by a single neutral leader called [[Taal]].<ref name="AE" />

==History==
The Aramandi jealously controlled the [[Aramand Cluster]], within the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]], mainly because it was the the area of their birth.

As the [[Lant Mining Corporation]] exhausted its worlds, they began making overtures to the Aramandi, hoping to gain access to the Cluster. With the advent of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], the Aramandi were also courted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and given elaborate concessions to allow a simple garrison to be erected on Aram. In return, the Aramandi were left alone.<ref name="AE" />
